hyperedges.label: Quant loop: IC evaluation → search → OOS gate
Quant strategy-search framework (IC evaluator -> search loop -> OOS gate)
Order safety funnel (LLM/strategy -> place_order wrapper -> guardrails -> broker MCP)
Paper-trade eval pipeline (DecisionEngine -> papertrade engine -> trade ledger -> evaluate)
